titleStmt.title: Letter from E. O’Farrell to A.E. Moore, 8 March 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Edward O'Farrell

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from Sir Edward O’Farrell (c.1857-1926), the assistant under-secretary, to Arthur Edward Moore(b. 1872), a Professor of Pathology at University College Cork.As a person licensed to carry out experiments on animals, A.E. Moore was obliged to furnish an annual Return of Experiments. In this letter, Edward O'Farrell writes to inform Moore that his Return is being sent back to him for signature.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers, CSO RP/1916/4481

correspAction.placeName: Pathological Laboratory, University College, Cork, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
CHIEF SECRETARY'S OFFICE DUBLIN CASTLE.
3932. 8th March, 1916. Sir, I am directed by the Chief Secretary to transmit
herewith for your signature Return in original of the
experiments performed by you during the year 1915 under
the licence granted to you under the provisions of the Act
39 and 40 Vic., C.77. I am,
Sir,
Your obedient Servant, E. O'Farrell A.E.Moore, Esq.,M.B., Pathological Laboratory, University College, Cork.
To be returned
